words.exampleBs: Putnici su stigli na aerodrom rano.
words.exampleEn: The passengers arrived at the airport early.

words.exampleArabic: لَا تَنْسَ جَوَازَ سَفَرِكَ قَبْلَ السَّفَرِ.
words.exampleBs: Ne zaboravi pasoš prije putovanja.
words.exampleEn: Don't forget your passport before travelling.

words.exampleBs: Treba mu viza za ulazak u tu zemlju.
words.exampleEn: He needs a visa to enter the country.

words.exampleBs: Kupio sam avionsku kartu putem interneta.
words.exampleEn: I bought the plane ticket online.

words.exampleBs: Stavila je svoju odjeću u kofer.
words.exampleEn: She put her clothes in the bag.

words.exampleArabic: نَزَلْنَا فِي فُنْدُقٍ قَرِيبٍ مِنَ الْبَحْرِ.
words.exampleBs: Odsjeli smo u hotelu blizu mora.
words.exampleEn: We stayed in a hotel near the sea.

words.exampleArabic: قَامَ بِحَجْزِ غُرْفَةٍ فِي الْفُنْدُقِ مُسْبَقًا.
words.exampleBs: Unaprijed je rezervirao sobu u hotelu.
words.exampleEn: He booked a hotel room in advance.

words.exampleBs: Putovanje je bilo dugo, ali ugodno.
words.exampleEn: The journey was long but enjoyable.

words.exampleArabic: مَا هِيَ وِجْهَتُكَ فِي هَذِهِ الْعُطْلَةِ؟
words.exampleBs: Koje je tvoje odredište ovog odmora?
words.exampleEn: What is your destination this holiday?

words.exampleBs: Polazak je u osam sati ujutro.
words.exampleEn: The departure time is eight o'clock in the morning.

words.exampleArabic: يُتَوَقَّعُ الْوُصُولُ إِلَى الْمَدِينَةِ بَعْدَ سَاعَتَيْنِ.
words.exampleBs: Dolazak u grad se očekuje za dva sata.
words.exampleEn: Arrival in the city is expected in two hours.

words.exampleArabic: أَجَابَ عَنِ الْأَسْئِلَةِ عِنْدَ الْجُمْرُكِ بِهُدُوءٍ.
words.exampleBs: Mirno je odgovarao na pitanja na carini.
words.exampleEn: He answered questions at customs calmly.

words.exampleBs: Prešli su granicu nakon provjere dokumenata.
words.exampleEn: They crossed the border after document inspection.

words.exampleBs: Sjeli smo u brzi voz prema glavnom gradu.
words.exampleEn: We took the fast train to the capital.

words.exampleArabic: تَأْخُذُ الْحَافِلَةَ كُلَّ يَوْمٍ إِلَى الْعَمَلِ.
words.exampleBs: Svaki dan uzima autobus na posao.
words.exampleEn: She takes the bus to work every day.

words.exampleArabic: طَلَبَ سَيَّارَةَ الْأُجْرَةِ مِنْ تَطْبِيقِ الْهَاتِفِ.
words.exampleBs: Naručio je taksi putem aplikacije na telefonu.
words.exampleEn: He ordered a taxi through a phone app.

words.exampleBs: Poslužio se mapom kako bi pronašao put.
words.exampleEn: He used the map to find the way.

words.exampleBs: Policajca je pitala za pravi smjer.
words.exampleEn: She asked the police officer for the right direction.

words.exampleArabic: أَرْشَدَنَا الدَّلِيلُ السِّيَاحِيُّ إِلَى الْمَعَالِمِ الرَّئِيسِيَّةِ.
words.exampleBs: Turistički vodič nas je odveo do glavnih znamenitosti.
words.exampleEn: The tour guide led us to the main attractions.

words.exampleArabic: زُرْنَا أَهَمَّ الْمَعَالِمِ التَّارِيخِيَّةِ فِي الْمَدِينَةِ.
words.exampleBs: Posjetili smo najvažnije historijske znamenitosti u gradu.
words.exampleEn: We visited the most important historical landmarks in the city.

words.exampleArabic: ذَهَبَ إِلَى مَكْتَبِ صَرْفِ الْعُمْلَةِ لِتَغْيِيرِ النُّقُودِ.
words.exampleBs: Otišao je u mjenjačnicu da zamijeni novac.
words.exampleEn: He went to the currency exchange office to change money.

words.exampleBs: Pronašli su ugodan smještaj po razumnoj cijeni.
words.exampleEn: They found comfortable accommodation at a reasonable price.

words.exampleArabic: تَعْتَمِدُ الْمَدِينَةُ اعْتِمَادًا كَبِيرًا عَلَى السِّيَاحَةِ.
words.exampleBs: Grad se u velikoj mjeri oslanja na turizam.
words.exampleEn: The city relies heavily on tourism.

words.exampleBs: Avion je letio iznad oblaka.
words.exampleEn: The airplane flew above the clouds.

words.exampleBs: Putnici su strpljivo čekali na stanici.
words.exampleEn: The passengers waited patiently at the station.

words.exampleArabic: رَسَتِ السَّفِينَةُ فِي الْمِيناءِ عِنْدَ الْفَجْرِ.
words.exampleBs: Brod je uplovio u luku u zoru.
words.exampleEn: The ship docked at the port at dawn.

words.exampleBs: Hotelska soba je bila prostrana i čista.
words.exampleEn: The hotel room was spacious and clean.

words.exampleBs: Krenuli su brdskim putem koji je bio težak.
words.exampleEn: They took a rugged mountain road.

words.exampleBs: Putovao je u Egipat zbog studija.
words.exampleEn: He travelled to Egypt to study.

words.exampleBs: Unaprijed je rezervirala avionske karte.
words.exampleEn: She booked the plane tickets early.

words.exampleBs: Tim je stigao u hotel uvečer.
words.exampleEn: The team arrived at the hotel in the evening.

words.exampleBs: Gosti su jutros napustili hotel.
words.exampleEn: The guests departed the hotel this morning.

words.exampleBs: Iznajmio je auto za obilatak grada.
words.exampleEn: He rented a car for the city tour.

words.exampleBs: Dugo smo šetali starim čaršijama.
words.exampleEn: We roamed the old markets for a long time.

words.exampleBs: Po prvi put se ukrcala u avion.
words.exampleEn: She boarded a plane for the first time.

words.exampleBs: Izgubio je kofer na aerodromu.
words.exampleEn: He lost his bag at the airport.

words.exampleArabic: اسْتَعْلَمَتْ عَنْ مَوَاعِيدِ الرَّحَلَاتِ فِي الْمَكْتَبِ.
words.exampleBs: Raspitala se o rasporedima letova u uredu.
words.exampleEn: She inquired about flight schedules at the office.

words.exampleBs: Hotel je malo dalek od aerodroma.
words.exampleEn: The hotel is a little far from the airport.

words.exampleBs: Stanica je blizu tržnog centra.
words.exampleEn: The station is close to the shopping centre.

words.exampleArabic: كَانَ الْمَطَارُ مُزْدَحِمًا جِدًّا فِي الْعُطْلَةِ.
words.exampleBs: Aerodrom je bio veoma prepun tokom praznika.
words.exampleEn: The airport was very crowded during the holiday.

words.exampleBs: Radi u međunarodnoj avio kompaniji.
words.exampleEn: He works for an international airline.

words.exampleArabic: سَافَرْنَا مَبَاشِرَةً إِلَى دُبَيٍّ دُونَ تَوَقُّفٍ.
words.exampleBs: Putovali smo direktno u Dubai bez zaustavljanja.
words.exampleEn: We travelled directly to Dubai without stopping.

words.exampleBs: Skreni desno nakon semafora.
words.exampleEn: Turn right after the traffic light.

words.exampleBs: Skreni lijevo kod kružnog toka.
words.exampleEn: Turn left at the roundabout.

words.exampleBs: Kako doći do stanice metroa?
words.exampleEn: How do I get to the metro station?
